name: accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in expense reporting. We automate categorization instead of manual entry and categorization of expenses.
problem_solved: Manual categorization of bank statement transactions is time-consuming.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual categorization of bank statement transactions is time-consuming.
